subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath manifested His Cause amidst His servants with a sovereignty that no opposition can withhold. Peerless and incomparable is this Day, for the Ancient Beauty is established upon the Most Great Throne, drawing forth through His Revelation [3.5s]... ...Gracious God! The people of God suffered themselves to be killed rather than kill. During the events that came to pass, they were the embodiments of utter meekness
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو قد اظهر امره بین العباد بسلطان مامنعه الاعراض... این یوم را شبه و مثل نبوده و نیست چه که جمال قدم بر عرش اعظم مستوی جذب ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @martyrs and martyrdom
